title: Sports Starter Pack
description: Classic sports trivia across trophies, rules, teams, and famous athletes.

questions.prompt: How many players are on the court for one basketball team during normal play?
questions.hint: Think of the five traditional positions.
questions.explanation: A basketball team has five players on the court during standard play.

questions.prompt: Which tournament awards the FIFA World Cup trophy?
questions.hint: FIFA governs the world's most popular ball sport.
questions.explanation: The FIFA World Cup is the top international soccer tournament.

questions.prompt: A tennis match can be played as singles or doubles.
questions.hint: Doubles puts two players on each side.
questions.explanation: Tennis can be played one-on-one as singles or two-on-two as doubles.

questions.prompt: In baseball, how many strikes usually make an out?
questions.explanation: A batter is usually out after three strikes.

questions.prompt: The Olympic Games are symbolized by five interlocking _____.
questions.hint: They appear in blue, yellow, black, green, and red.
questions.explanation: The Olympic symbol is five interlocking rings.

questions.prompt: Which sport is associated with Wimbledon?
questions.hint: The event is famous for grass courts.
questions.explanation: Wimbledon is one of tennis's four Grand Slam tournaments.

questions.prompt: Which athlete is famous for winning eight gold medals in swimming at the 2008 Olympics?
questions.hint: He is the most decorated Olympian in history.
questions.explanation: Michael Phelps won eight swimming gold medals at the 2008 Beijing Olympics.

questions.prompt: In golf, the goal is to complete each hole in as few strokes as possible.
questions.hint: Lower scores are better in golf.
